nodes.name: 新幾內亞高地
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞高地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Chestnut forest rail、Archbold's nightjar，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: Archbold's nightjar
nodes.summary: Archbold's nightjar（Archbold's nightjar，学名 Eurostopodus archboldi），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于新幾內亞島、新幾內亞高地，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联82种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等82种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Rand|Rand]], 1935 | range_map = Geographic range of Archbold's nightjar.png | range_map_caption = Geographic range of Archbold's nightjar }} Archbold's nightjar (Eurostopodus archboldi), also known as the mountain eared-nightjar or cloud-forest nightjar, is a dark and densely spotted species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is endemic to New Guinea and is the only nightjar species inhabiting the high-elevation subtropical and tropical montane forests of New Guinea

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Archbold's nightjar is a species endemic to New Guinea, dwelling in the highlands of the Central Cordillera mountain ranges. It has a patchy distribution, restricted to montane forests situated near clearings and open heathy regions. In fact, Archbold's nightjar is the sole high-mountain nightjar species of New Guinea, found in elevations of up to . Records indicate that this species is sedentary , exhibiting limited seasonal movement

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Rand|Rand]], 1935 | range_map = Geographic range of Archbold's nightjar.png | range_map_caption = Geographic range of Archbold's nightjar }} Archbold's nightjar (Eurostopodus archboldi), also known as the mountain eared-nightjar or cloud-forest nightjar, is a dark and densely spotted species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is endemic to New Guinea and is the only nightjar species inhabiting the high-elevation subtropical and tropical montane forests of New Guinea

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: archboldi's strong reliance on montane forest habitat. As such, given the reduction in tree cover driven by deforestation within its range over the past decade, it is speculated that this rate of habitat loss has likely led to an estimated population decline of 5% during this period. Despite indications of population decline and threats to Archbold's nightjar, there are no clear conservation decisions implemented as of yet because knowledge of this elusive species remains limited. Moreover, the lack of targeted research and monitoring programs for this species further limits understanding of its ecology, population dynamics, and potential conservation needs
